Description: Corrupted Strike — a dark energy strike that corrodes and drains life.
DescriptionEn: Corrupted Strike — a dark energy strike that corrodes and drains life.
DescriptionFr: Frappe Corrompue — une frappe d'énergie ténébreuse qui corrode et draine la vie.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 350 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 350 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 350 dégâts physiques à un ennemi.
